home.title: Export Platform for Uzbekistan & Afghanistan
home.desc: Discover an export platform helping Indian manufacturers enter Uzbekistan and Afghanistan with showroom placement and trade support.

about.title: About the Market
about.desc: Learn why we focus on Uzbekistan and Afghanistan through market entry built around logistics, demand, and regional trade potential.

products.title: Export-Ready Products
products.desc: Browse certified, export-ready products across food, industrial, medical, and consumer sectors for Uzbekistan and Afghanistan markets.

membership.title: Participation & Membership
membership.desc: Join the Indian Trade House export program, compare participation plans, and place your products in certified international showrooms.

services.title: Services & Support
services.desc: Explore export, legal, logistics, compliance, and business support services designed for Indian exporters entering Uzbekistan and Afghanistan.

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.desc: Contact Indian Trade House for export inquiries, partnerships, showroom details, and direct support for Uzbekistan and Afghanistan market entry.
